title: Define and implement continuous integration
summary: Create automated pipelines that continuously build, test, and deploy your applications and prepare for Exam AZ-400: Designing and Implementing Microsoft DevOps Solutions.

sections.title: Define and implement continuous integration
sections.summary: Create automated pipelines that continuously build, test, and deploy your applications and prepare for Exam AZ-400: Designing and Implementing Microsoft DevOps Solutions.

lessons.title: Build continuous integration workflows by using GitHub Actions
lessons.content_md:
Learn how to create workflows to add continuous integration (CI) to your projects.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/github-actions-ci/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Build continuous integration workflows by using GitHub Actions

labs.title: Laboratorio opcional: aplica Define and implement continuous integration
labs.instructions_md: Lleva a la practica lo aprendido en **Define and implement continuous integration**. Implementa un escenario pequeno y documenta tu solucion. Este laboratorio es opcional pero refuerza la retencion.

rubric.description: La solucion cumple el objetivo del laboratorio.
La explicacion es comprensible y ordenada.
